---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Tower
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What coordination pain are you hitting? (e.g. "two agents keep colliding on X")

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like Tower to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've tried or ruled out.

**Scope check**
Is this MVP-sized, or roadmap (prediction / auto-resolve / cross-repo / enterprise)?
See [MVP-SPEC.md](../../MVP-SPEC.md).
